meanings.definition: a person whose interests are protected by an insurance policy; a person who contracts for an insurance policy that indemnifies him against loss of property or life or health etc.
be careful or certain to do something; make certain of something
examples: He verified that the valves were closed
See that the curtains are closed
control the quality of the product
This nest egg will ensure a nice retirement for us
all members of the film cast and crew are insured
